title: Employee Onboarding Guide
text: Welcome to AcmeCorp. To get started: 1) create an account 2) request access to Slack channel #welcome 3) complete security training. For VPN access contact IT@acmecorp.com.

title: Expense Reimbursement Policy
text: Submit expenses monthly via the Finance portal. Receipts over $50 require manager approval. Reimbursements processed on the 15th of each month.

title: VPN Troubleshooting
text: If VPN fails, confirm your MFA device, restart machine, and re-install VPN client v2.1. If that fails, open a ticket with IT using the 'VPN' label.
